summary: RBAC Team Management feature testing completed. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all components working correctly: Team page loads, invite modal opens with proper form elements, role dropdowns functional, remove member buttons present, role permissions reference displayed, and sidebar role badge visible.

frontend_ui_tests.team_page_loads: PASS - Team Management page renders correctly
frontend_ui_tests.invite_button: PASS - Invite Member button present with data-testid
frontend_ui_tests.invite_modal: PASS - Modal opens with email input, role select, submit button
frontend_ui_tests.role_dropdowns: PASS - 8 role dropdowns found for non-owner members
frontend_ui_tests.role_permissions_section: PASS - All 4 roles displayed with permissions
frontend_ui_tests.sidebar_role_badge: PASS - Owner badge visible in sidebar

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation is well-structured with clear role hierarchy (owner > finance_admin > developer > read_only)
Permission checks properly implemented via requireOrgOwner and requirePermission middleware
Invite flow includes proper validation: email normalization, duplicate check, owner email check, role validation
Invite tokens are cryptographically secure (32 bytes random) with 7-day expiration
Audit events properly logged for member.invited, member.role_changed, member.removed
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Role badges use consistent color coding across sidebar and team page
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing with TEST_ prefix are cleaned up automatically by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC Team Management feature fully tested. All 8 API endpoints working: GET /team, GET /team/roles, GET /team/my-role, POST /team/invite, GET /team/invite/:token, POST /team/accept-invite, PATCH /team/:id, DELETE /team/:id. Frontend Team page at /dashboard/team has all required UI elements with proper data-testid attributes. Two pending invites exist: developer@example.com (developer) and finance@example.com (finance_admin).

features_verified.GET /api/v1/team: Lists owner + invited members with current_user info
features_verified.GET /api/v1/team/roles: Returns 4 roles with permissions and descriptions
features_verified.GET /api/v1/team/my-role: Returns current user's role, permissions, and org info
features_verified.POST /api/v1/team/invite: Creates pending member with invite token (owner only)
features_verified.POST /api/v1/team/accept-invite: Activates member and clears invite token
features_verified.PATCH /api/v1/team/:id: Updates member role (owner only, cannot set to owner)
features_verified.DELETE /api/v1/team/:id: Removes member by setting status to 'removed'
features_verified.Frontend Team page: Renders with members list, invite modal, role dropdowns, remove buttons
features_verified.Frontend Role badge: Shows in sidebar with correct role color
